perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with black hair in pigtails and a white tank top stands in a bright yellow room, gesturing to the camera. (2) She sits at a white table with a bowl of fried noodles and pig's blood soup; she pours red chili sauce from a squeeze bottle onto the noodles and begins eating enthusiastically with chopsticks. (3) Transition to a plate of three pan-fried buns; she adds sauce and takes a large bite, showing an expressive, satisfied face. (4) She eats a bowl of thick wheat noodle soup (Damiangeng), slurping the noodles. (5) She holds up two Zespri kiwifruits, cuts one open, and eats the golden flesh with a spoon, smiling widely. (6) A green promotional poster appears on screen with QR codes and event details. (7) She returns to the screen holding two kiwifruits, waving goodbye.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic pop music with a strong beat starts immediately. A high-pitched, energetic female voice speaks in Mandarin. (2) Sounds of eating, slurping, and 'pop' sound effects coincide with text appearing on screen. (3) The music maintains a consistent, high-energy tempo throughout the food sequence. (4) The female narrator's tone becomes more informative and promotional as she discusses the benefits of the fruit and explains an upcoming event. (5) The music fades out slightly at the very end as she gives a final greeting.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '吃台中 Style 早餐' (Eating Taichung style breakfast) - hook, energetic tone. (2) '炒麵 + 豬血湯' (Fried noodles + pig's blood soup) - functional text. (3) '完食!' (Finished eating!) - decorative/hook. (4) '水煎包' (Pan-fried buns) and '大麵羹' (Big wheat noodle soup) - functional text. (5) 'Zespri 奇異果' (Zespri kiwifruit) - brand name. (6) '快充！全台早餐營養GO' (Fast charge! Taiwan breakfast nutrition GO) - promotional hook. (7) '5月15日 - 6月14日' (May 15th - June 14th) - functional event information.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Multi-course food tasting -> Brand/Nutrition pivot -> Event Promotion -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator consistently appears throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with black hair tied in pigtails, wearing a white halter-style tank top and minimal jewelry (rings and earrings).

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Primary background is a bright yellow room with shelves holding trophies, a computer monitor, and a fan. Secondary backgrounds include a white table for eating and a beige sofa with plush toys (dog and tiger).

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Food Demonstration -> Product Solution -> Call to Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote Zespri SunGold Kiwifruit by integrating it into a popular 'food tour' format. It showcases traditional Taichung breakfast items (which are tasty but heavy) and positions the kiwifruit as the essential nutritional 'fast charge' to complete the meal. It concludes with a specific call to action for a promotional event held at Taipei MRT stations.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator shifts from general food reviewing to highlighting the nutritional benefits of Zespri kiwifruit, featuring brand logos, professional graphics, and a specific promotional event period.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-saturation yellow background, variety-show style text graphics, fast-paced 'mukbang' style eating shots.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively uses the contrast between greasy traditional breakfast and the refreshing image of kiwifruit to create a 'health-conscious' narrative within a food vlog context.
